title: After TikTok, Snap settles social media addiction case | TechCrunch
summary: Snap is the latest big tech company to settle a lawsuit that claimed social media platforms are harmful to children and young adults. The terms of Snap’s agreement weren’t disclosed, but Bloomberg reports that Snap confirmed the settlement has been achieved.
